name: idempotent_shell_replay
description: Run the same shell task twice with the same idempotency key and assert the second execution replays the completed result instead of re-running the command.

steps.title: Run idempotent shell command first time
steps.goal: Run a shell command that increments a counter in the workspace

metadata.args: -c "import pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('idempotent-shell-counter.txt'); n=int(p.read_text()) + 1 if p.exists() else 1; p.write_text(str(n)); print(n)"

steps.title: Run idempotent shell command second time
steps.goal: Re-run the same shell command with the same idempotency key

metadata.args: -c "import pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('idempotent-shell-counter.txt'); n=int(p.read_text()) + 1 if p.exists() else 1; p.write_text(str(n)); print(n)"
